mapper.select: /* SapCancelResultMapper.xml cancelResultSendTargetList */ SELECT 'RDC' || #{sysdate} || '_' || A.EXTERNORDERKEY AS SYSID , A.BATCHKEY , A.OWKEY , A.EXTERNORDERKEY , A.CUSTORDKEY AS CUSTOMERORDERKEY , A.REGDT , A.PRCSYN AS PROCESSYN , A.PRCSDATE AS PROCESSDATE , A.BATEXECID AS BAT_EXEC_ID , A.INSERTDATE , A.INSERTURKEY , A.UPDATEDATE , A.UPDATEURKEY FROM TORDER_BATCH_CANCEL_RESULT A JOIN TORDER_INFO_CO_HD CH ON A.OWKEY = CH.OWKEY AND A.CUSTOMERORDERKEY = CH.CUSTOMERORDERKEY JOIN TORDER_MST_ORTYPE OT ON CH.OWKEY = OT.OWKEY AND CH.OR_TYPE_CD = OT.OR_TYPE_CD WHERE A.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND A.REGDT BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND COALESCE(A.PROCESSYN, 'N') = 'N' AND OT.IBYN = #{ibyn} AND OT.OBYN = #{obyn}
